transcript.clean_text: watch the Tour de Swiss each and every day live and On Demand on gcn Plus the 86th edition of the race started with a time trial starting and finishing in Einstein an interesting 12.7 kilometer course one-time check at seven kilometers in and some of the best time trial lists in the world to take it on a yellow Jersey stage went up for grabs the first of eight days in Switzerland was the first to go fastest in einsteadent the former Italian national champion looking really strong it was another Italian Matia Catanio who was looking good as well should our Quick Step man provisionally second earlier in the day that's before Magnus Sheffield turned up seven seconds quicker at the intermediate time check and looking really good for the in your screen it is in fact he put another second or so into sombrero it was 8.89 seconds his lead a new man in the hot seat the young American not better by the young Swiss Stefan bissiga the European Champion not able to put in his best performance a disappointment for the man from EF education easy post there had been plenty of disappointment for Stefan Kung Italia but this time he was really on top form looking positive looking aggressive and going very very quickly still down on Magnus Sheffield at the intermediate time check but just one second in it on home roads and flying Stefan Kung put more time in the second half with that difficult uphill finish in the end 11 seconds quicker than the American Sheffield adding to the lead but while was on course albeit slower than kung and he'd stay slower first ride since still solid enough from the Belgian talking to belgians the man who disappointed Kung on a couple of occasions at the Giro Remco wave Nepal was back at the time off the bike following a covert positive and he was back in form two albeit not good enough to deny Stefan King the win the Swiss was able to celebrate at home a six second victory over eveningpool Kung taking the opening stage his third down the years at his national tour and taking the yellow Jersey as well even of all best of the main GC contenders Kung with a brilliant start it's fan club his friends his family and his children there to watch him Stephen yet again the leader of his national tour hoping to hold on to it on stage two but plenty of strong riding with a super strong field to try and take it off him with seven days racing still remaining the turtle Swiss now moves into Hillier terrain and then quickly into the mountains it's an aggressive race a demanding race a difficult race you can see it all live or On Demand on gcn Plus
